rulings.Case Title: CARMEN ALUY et al VS. BANK OF AMERICA N.A et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, February 29, 2012, line 6. Defendant's Demurrer To 1st Amended Complaint First cause of action declaratory relief sustained without leave to amend, 2nd cause of action overruled, 3rd cause of action injunctive relief overruled. proper motion is to strike. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN HENDERSON VS. WELLS FARGO BANK N.A. et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, February 29, 2012, line 1. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK N.A., PROXIMITY REAL ESTATE CORPORATION, KESTER WISE' DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Hearing required re applicability of Civil Code 47 to enforcement of writ as to John Henderson. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ALTHEMUS COLEMAN VS. 250 KEARNY STREET, LLC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Dissolve Preliminary Injunction (Ccp 532 & 533)
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, February 29, 2012, line 7. DEFENDANT GITLOW INVESTORS' Motion To Dissolve Preliminary Injunction (Ccp 532 & 533) Hearing Required. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: TONY CHOU et al VS. WELLS FARGO BANK N.A. et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, February 29, 2012, line 2. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT First cause of action sustained without leave to amend. 2nd thru 6th causes of action sustained with leave to amend re 6th cause of action, injunctive relief should be replead as remedy. (501/REQ)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn To Vacate Default And Default Judgmnt
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, February 29, 2012, line 3. DEFENDANT AZKANAZ MACKITARIAN's Motion to Vacate Default And Default Judgment. Off calendar per moving party. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WELLS FARGO BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION VS. ANTHONY VERMILLION et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, February 29, 2012, line 8. PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Grant. No opposition filed. Commercial tenancy terminated after senior deed of trust foreclosed upon. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HYDE HILL HOLDINGS, L.P. A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. SUPINFO USA, LLC , A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, February 29, 2012, line 9. PLAINTIFF HYDE HILL HOLDINGS' MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Hearing required. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: Z&N APARTMENTS VS. ZAUR BOLOKOV et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, February 29, 2012, line 4. DEFENDANT ZAUR BOLOKOV's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT sustained with leave to amend complaint based on 60 day notice paragraph 7e exhibit #2, therefore premature. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: Z&N APARTMENTS VS. ZAUR BOLOKOV et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, February 29, 2012, line 4. DEFENDANT ZAUR BOLOKOV's AMENDED DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT sustained with leave to amend complaint based on 60 day notice paragraph 7e exhibit #2, therefore premature. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CARMEN JIMENEZ VS. OPELIA MARINO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, February 29, 2012, line 5. DEFENDANT ROBYN MARINO's MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS Deny; untimely filed because hearing date not within 3-7 days CCP 1167.4. (501/REQ)
